summary: Tight, hot show with a solid first set; excellent high‑fidelity recording but drums lack punch
review: The performance is praised as tight and energetic through the first set and early second set, though the drum segment feels less dynamic. The taper’s state‑of‑the‑art equipment captures the bass beautifully, delivering an overall nice and highly detailed recording.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 4‑star review; it highlights a strong show and excellent sound quality with minor criticism of the drum segment, leading to an overall rating around four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: State‑of‑the‑art taper equipment; bass frequencies reproduced faultlessly; overall clean and enjoyable recording

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set tight and hot, second set strong until the drum segment where energy tapers off
